The original measure has a dotted half note (c3) followed by a quarter rest (z), totaling 4 quarter-note beats in 2/4 time, which is incorrect—so the task is to rewrite it with three dotted notes.  
Option A correctly uses three dotted notes (c3, c3/2, c7/4) and fills the measure with rests to match 2/4 time.  
Thus, the correct answer is \boxed{A}.
